creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have tried it a few times but I really can't reproduce the problem on
my machines, both 6.1 one with mysql another without.

Some third party report would be useful. Anyone else experiencing this
problem? please report!

I'm still trying to understand where the problem could be. Any more
information would be useful.

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
